prompt: Build a dashboard stat card component in HTML and CSS. It should display a key metric label (like 'Monthly Revenue'), the numeric value ($12,450), and a percentage change indicator (+8.2%). Make it polished and professional. Output a single self-contained HTML file with embedded CSS.
assertions: Uses hsl() color notation for CSS color values
Applies at least two distinct font-weight values (heavier for value, lighter for label)
The metric value uses a visibly larger font-size than the label text
Secondary text (label, metadata) uses a muted/lighter color distinct from primary value
